final:
module top_module(input wire D,input wire Clock,input wire Reset ,output reg Q);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ ( posedge Clock or posedge Reset  or posedge dbg_halt) 
  begin 
  if (Reset) 
  begin 
  Q <= 1'b0; 
  end 
  else 
  begin 
  if (D) 
  Q <= ! Q; 
  end 
  end 
  endmodule
